Home / Services / Emergency Towing

Emergency Towing

24/7 rapid response for breakdowns and accidents across Tulsa.

When your car quits on the Riverside Drive curve or you're in a fender-bender near Woodland Hills Mall, our emergency towing gets you moving fast.

Our dispatch center monitors weather alerts and traffic patterns, positioning trucks strategically for quick response. All operators carry jump packs, fuel, and basic tools to attempt roadside fixes before towing.

We handle everything from compact cars to full-size pickups stranded in Brookside's narrow streets. After dark, all trucks have amber warning lights and reflective gear for safe nighttime recoveries.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Call our 24/7 dispatch - provide location and vehicle details
  2. 02 Step 2: Receive ETA and quote confirmation via text
  3. 03 Step 3: Operator arrives with appropriate equipment for your vehicle
  4. 04 Step 4: Secure transport to your chosen destination

Benefits

  • Average 15-minute citywide response
  • Trained for accident scene safety
  • Direct billing to insurance companies
  • After-hours lockout service available

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you tow after major accidents?

Yes, we work with Tulsa PD to clear wrecked vehicles safely. Our operators are certified in post-collision stabilization and fluid containment.

What if I need a tow during a tornado warning?

We run emergency service until roads become impassable. During active warnings, we prioritize life-threatening situations alongside first responders.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with emergency towing? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: 555-tow-r91
